---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Derek Sleepfield"
description-meta: "A small library of not-academic writing by Derek Wakefield."
toc: false
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
            #title-block-header { display: none; }
          </style>
---

::: {.shelf-landing}

<div id="shelfFeaturedParable" class="shelf-featured" aria-live="polite">
  <p class="shelf-featured-loading"><em>fetching a parable&hellip;</em></p>
</div>

<p class="shelf-featured-actions">
  <a href="#" id="shelfAnotherStory">&#x21bb; another parable</a>
  &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;
  <a href="/bobble-canon.html">read all forty &rarr;</a>
</p>

:::

```{=html}
<aside id="shelfOutline" class="shelf-outline-fixed" aria-label="Writing outline">
  <div class="shelf-outline-title">Writing</div>

  <div class="shelf-outline-section">
    <div class="shelf-outline-header">Personal</div>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="/posts/personal/2026-05-14-a-voice-that-listens.html">A Voice That Listens</a></li>
      <li><a href="/posts/personal/2026-05-19-friends-we-find.html">Friends We Find</a></li>
      <li><a href="/posts/personal/2026-05-22-where-the-anthill-was.html">Where the Anthill Was</a></li>
      <li><a href="/posts/personal/2026-05-24-on-cognitive-capture.html">On Cognitive Capture</a></li>
      <li><a href="/posts/personal/2026-05-24-when-anthills-decay.html">When Anthills Decay</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="shelf-outline-section">
    <div class="shelf-outline-header">Bobology</div>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="/bobble-canon.html" class="shelf-outline-current">The Bobble Canon</a>
        <ul class="shelf-canon-list" id="shelfCanonList"></ul>
      </li>
      <li><a href="/introduction-to-bobology.html">Introduction to Bobology</a></li>
      <li><a href="/bob-is-you.html">Bob is You</a></li>
      <li><a href="/the-4b-framework.html">The 4B Framework</a></li>
      <li><a href="/bobbish-in-4-voices.html">Bobbish in 4 Voices</a></li>
      <li><a href="/the-wand-and-the-hand.html">The Wand and the Hand</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="shelf-outline-section">
    <div class="shelf-outline-header">Short Stories</div>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="/posts/short-stories/2026-05-26-the-bread-speaks.html">The Bread Speaks</a></li>
      <li><a href="/posts/short-stories/2026-05-26-the-lichen-quarrel.html">The Lichen Quarrel</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="shelf-outline-section">
    <div class="shelf-outline-header">Notes &amp; Misc</div>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="/sinatra-2016-memo.html">Sinatra et al. 2016 &mdash; three-page memo</a></li>
      <li><a href="/gem-wars-lore.html">Gem Wars: Lore</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</aside>

<aside id="shelfScene" class="shelf-scene-fixed" aria-label="Scene for the current parable">
  <div class="shelf-scene-label" id="shelfSceneLabel">scene</div>
  <pre class="shelf-scene-art" id="shelfSceneArt">     fetching&hellip;</pre>
</aside>
```

<script src="/stories.js"></script>
<script src="/parable-ascii.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  function pickStory(excludeNum) {
    var stories = window.SHELF_STORIES || [];
    if (!stories.length) return null;
    if (stories.length === 1) return stories[0];
    var s, attempts = 0;
    do {
      s = stories[Math.floor(Math.random() * stories.length)];
      attempts++;
    } while (excludeNum && s.num === excludeNum && attempts < 20);
    return s;
  }

  function escapeHtml(s) {
    return s.replace(/&/g, "&amp;").replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;");
  }

  function renderStory(s) {
    var bodyHtml = s.body.map(function (p) { return '<p>' + p + '</p>'; }).join('\n');
    var codaHtml = s.coda.length
      ? '<div class="shelf-featured-coda">' +
          s.coda.map(function (line) { return '<p>' + line + '</p>'; }).join('') +
        '</div>'
      : '';
    return (
      '<h2 class="shelf-featured-title">' +
        '<span class="shelf-featured-num">Canon ' + escapeHtml(s.num) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="shelf-featured-name"> &mdash; ' + escapeHtml(s.name) + '</span>' +
      '</h2>' +
      '<div class="shelf-featured-body">' + bodyHtml + '</div>' +
      codaHtml
    );
  }

  function updateScene(num) {
    var label = document.getElementById("shelfSceneLabel");
    var art   = document.getElementById("shelfSceneArt");
    if (!label || !art) return;
    var ascii = (window.SHELF_ASCII || {})[num];
    label.textContent = "Canon " + num;
    art.textContent = ascii || ("\n  (no scene yet for Canon " + num + ")\n");
  }

  function highlightOutline(num) {
    var list = document.getElementById("shelfCanonList");
    if (!list) return;
    list.querySelectorAll("a").forEach(function (a) {
      a.classList.toggle("current", a.getAttribute("data-canon-num") === num);
    });
  }

  function populateCanonList() {
    var list = document.getElementById("shelfCanonList");
    var stories = window.SHELF_STORIES || [];
    if (!list || !stories.length) return;
    list.innerHTML = stories.map(function (s) {
      return '<li><a href="#" data-canon-num="' + escapeHtml(s.num) +
        '" class="shelf-canon-link"><span class="shelf-canon-num">' +
        escapeHtml(s.num) + '</span> ' + escapeHtml(s.name) + '</a></li>';
    }).join("");
  }

  var currentNum = null;
  function showStory(s) {
    if (!s) return;
    currentNum = s.num;
    document.getElementById("shelfFeaturedParable").innerHTML = renderStory(s);
    updateScene(s.num);
    highlightOutline(s.num);
  }

  function showRandom() { showStory(pickStory(currentNum)); }

  function showByNum(num) {
    var s = (window.SHELF_STORIES || []).find(function (x) { return x.num === num; });
    if (s) showStory(s);
  }

  function init() {
    populateCanonList();
    showRandom();
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }

  document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    var another = e.target.closest("#shelfAnotherStory");
    if (another) {
      e.preventDefault();
      showRandom();
      document.getElementById("shelfFeaturedParable").scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      return;
    }
    var canonLink = e.target.closest(".shelf-canon-link");
    if (canonLink) {
      e.preventDefault();
      showByNum(canonLink.getAttribute("data-canon-num"));
      document.getElementById("shelfFeaturedParable").scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
    }
  });
})();
</script>
